creator: monochromec@gmail.com
text:
I can confirm this issue on a 64 bit FreeBSD guest running VB 5.0.16 on a Win10 host. VBox additions is version 4.3.36 (as part of the ports) and the corresponding modifications as outlined in https://wiki.freebsd.org/VirtualBox#Installing_Guest_Additions_for_FreeBSD_guests have been implemented.

Gnome fails as part of the session initialisation process when /usr/local/bin/VBClient-all invokes /usr/local/bin/VBClient --seamless.

Foul play between the guest additions and the host VB instance in terms of protocol issues?
